response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has reached the Series A funding stage, where it secured $8.5M in capital from prominent investors Sequoia and Y Combinator, pushing its current valuation to $42M. The 18-person startup boasts impressive operational traction, generating $120K in monthly recurring revenue (MRR) while sustaining a rapid 25% month-over-month (MoM) growth rate that positions it well for further expansion in its competitive sector.
